used_public_data.role: PCAP parser/session pipeline test and public-label TA11_02/TN01_01 feasibility reference
flow-label evaluation and manual review only; not PCAP parser input

coverage.TA43_01: not covered by reliable Nmap/port-scan PCAP in current tree; no scan_group produced
coverage.TA01_01: covered by CSE flow CSV only
coverage.TA01_02: covered by CSE flow CSV only, medium confidence
coverage.TA11_02: covered by CTU-13 public labels and CSE Bot flow CSV; parsed prompt records do not include labels as prompt answers
coverage.TN01_01: covered by CSE benign and CTU normal/background labels for evaluation planning

api_test_recommendation: Usable for a small Qwen3.5-27B smoke test of prompt formatting and parser-to-prompt flow, but not sufficient for balanced official-code performance testing until port-scan and backdoor samples are added.
